🔺 We thank our Russian friends for their support during the war and reaffirm Iran’s determination to continue its strategic partnership with Russia under the new circumstances.
🔺 President Putin said not only Russia, but the whole world is admiring the Iranian people for standing up to the US and winning this unfair and unequal war.

🔺 Cooperation between the two countries was also reviewed, and several good ideas were raised.

🔺 There are now strong grounds for further cooperation.

Iran's FM Araghchi on meeting with Russian Pres. Putin: 

🔺We had a very good meeting with Pres. Putin, lasting over an hour and a half.

🔺 All issues were discussed in detail, including bilateral ties, regional matters, and the war and aggression by the US and Israeli regimes. https://t.co/TsPfPrJ65j

🔺 Cooperation between the two countries was also reviewed, & several good ideas were raised.

🔺 There are now strong grounds for further cooperation.

Reuters reported, citing shipping data, that at least seven vessels, primarily dry bulk carriers, have transited the Strait of #Hormuz over the past 24 hours.

It added that tracking data from Kpler, along with satellite analysis by data analytics firm SynMax, indicated that the vessels included ships departing Iraqi ports, as well as one dry bulk carrier from an Iranian port.
